# Accepted baseline findings for the Lab 9 Go 1.24 CI environment.
# These are reachable Go standard-library findings reported by govulncheck
# on GitHub Actions with Go 1.24. They are documented in submissions/lab9.md
# and should be re-evaluated by 2026-10-01 or when the course baseline moves
# to a fixed Go toolchain.
